ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "member_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., Non-Member, Club-Member) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotations" (
  "quotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quotation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer to whom the quotation is addressed */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who generated the quotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the quotation was created */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the quotation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quotation (e.g., Pending, Approved, Declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotations_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of copies */,
  "paper_size" TEXT /* Size of paper (e.g., A6, A5, A4, US Letter) */,
  "non_member_price" REAL /* Price per copy for Non-Members */,
  "club_member_price" REAL /* Price per copy for Club-Members */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the pricing becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the pricing expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotation_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in a quotation */,
  "quotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quotation this item belongs to */,
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing entry used for this item */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of this item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per copy of this item */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for this item (quantity_ordered * price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotation_items_quotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("quotation_id") REFERENCES quotations ("quotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotation_items_pricing_id FOREIGN KEY ("pricing_id") REFERENCES pricing ("pricing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the printing material */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the material */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the material reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "quotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related quotation */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_quotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("quotation_id") REFERENCES quotations ("quotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this invoice is associated with */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Total amount due on the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date payment is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_history ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this payment belongs to */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Successful, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_history ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the discount */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Date until the discount is valid */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity required to apply the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotation_discounts" (
  "quotation_discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quotation discount entry */,
  "quotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quotation this discount is associated with */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount applied to the quotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quotation_discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotation_discounts_quotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("quotation_id") REFERENCES quotations ("quotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotation_discounts_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who generated the report */,
  "total_quotations" INTEGER /* Total number of quotations created */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total revenue generated from sales */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_history ("order_id")
)
